0.content:
## CI/CD & Orbital
Integration test runs from Orbital workers and GitHub Actions. Pass/fail by repo, arch, and run type.

**Types:** `local-docker-container` = Orbital | `github-workflow` = GitHub Actions

1.title: Total CI Runs (7d)
1.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize total = count()

2.title: Pass Rate (7d)
2.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize total = count(), passed = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` == "0")
| fieldsAdd passRate = round(toDouble(passed) / toDouble(total) * 100, decimals: 1)
| fields passRate

3.title: Orbital Runs (7d)
3.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter `content.codespace.type` == "local-docker-container"
| summarize total = count()

4.title: GitHub Actions Runs (7d)
4.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter `content.codespace.type` == "github-workflow"
| summarize total = count()

5.title: Avg Build Duration (minutes)
5.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| filter isNotNull(`content.codespace.creation`)
| summarize avgSec = avg(toLong(`content.codespace.creation`))
| fieldsAdd avgMin = round(toDouble(avgSec) / 60, decimals: 1)
| fields avgMin

6.title: CI Results by Repository
6.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize passed = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` == "0"), failed = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` != "0"), by:{`content.repository.name`}
| sort passed + failed desc
| limit 20

7.title: CI Results Over Time (daily)
7.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize passed = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` == "0"), failed = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` != "0"), by:{bin(timestamp, 1d)}

8.title: Runs by Architecture
8.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| summarize count = count(), passed = countIf(`content.codespace.errors` == "0"), by:{`content.codespace.arch`}

9.title: Failed Runs — Details
9.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| filter `content.codespace.errors` != "0"
| fields timestamp, `content.repository.name`, `content.codespace.type`, `content.codespace.arch`, `content.codespace.errors`, `content.codespace.creation`
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 50

10.title: Build Duration Distribution (seconds)
10.query:
fetch bizevents, from:now()-7d
| filter event.type == "codespacestracker.creation"
| filter in(`content.codespace.type`, "local-docker-container", "github-workflow")
| filter isNotNull(`content.codespace.creation`)
| summarize avgDuration = avg(toLong(`content.codespace.creation`)), maxDuration = max(toLong(`content.codespace.creation`)), minDuration = min(toLong(`content.codespace.creation`)), by:{`content.repository.name`}
| sort avgDuration desc
| limit 20
